title: Infused Immortality
description: Totem of undying, but with potions
body:
Infused Immortality is a mod for the ModFest Singularity, being made in only one week!

This simple mod allows you to combine totems of undying with potions.
These totems, when used, give the corresponding effect.

This mod should be compatible with any other mod that adds potions.


To craft a totem simply combine a normal totem of undying with a potion.
Combine the totem you crafted with a glass bottle to undo it.
